data.title: EnergySolutions to be Acquired by Energy Capital Partners (ECP)
data.description: In Summit, New Jersey & Salt Lake City, a definitive agreement has been announced by Energy Capital Partners ("ECP") to acquire EnergySolutions from TriArtisan Capital Advisors LLC. EnergySolutions, a prominent nuclear company, offers comprehensive solutions throughout the nuclear lifecycle. This acquisition signifies ECP's focus on energy transition infrastructure. EnergySolutions, an international company, specializes in nuclear fuel services, including safe transportation. This strategic move reflects ECP's commitment to the evolving energy sector.

data.title: Kforce Inc. to Announce First Quarter Results on April 27, 2026
data.description: Kforce Inc., a leading provider of professional staffing services and solutions, is set to announce its first-quarter results after the market closes on Monday, April 27, 2026. Following the release, a conference call will be held at 5:00 pm ET to discuss the financial outcomes. Participants can join the call by dialing (800) 715-9871 and using the conference passcode “Kforce”. A replay of the conference call will be accessible on the company's website at https://investor.kforce.com for a period of one year. Kforce Inc. trades on the New York Stock Exchange under the symbol KFRC.

data.title: Aeromax Acquires The Ely Company
data.description: Aerospace support company Aeromax Industries, based in Fort Worth, Texas, has recently acquired precision aerospace machining company The Ely Co., Inc. The acquisition marks Aeromax's first since being bought by Chimney Rock Equity Partners, LLC. The terms of the deal remain undisclosed. Ely, headquartered in Torrance, California, specializes in producing tight-tolerance components.

data.title: Fairfax India reveals details for hybrid annual meeting with shareholders. #Finance #Meeting #FairfaxIndia
data.description: A recent report reveals that the global economy is expected to grow by approximately 5.6% in the next year. This forecast is a significant increase from the previous year's growth rate of 4.5%. The anticipated growth is mainly attributed to the steady recovery from the COVID-19 pandemic and the increasing pace of vaccination efforts worldwide. Additionally, the report highlights that emerging markets are projected to experience a growth rate of around 6.3%, outpacing advanced economies. This disparity is primarily due to the differing vaccination rates and the effectiveness of containment measures implemented by various countries. Furthermore, the report emphasizes the importance of continued international cooperation and coordinated policy responses to ensure sustainable economic growth and recovery.

data.title: Palindrome Technologies Achieves Milestone ISO/IEC 42001 Accreditation, Setting the Global Standard for AI Trustworthiness and Governance
data.description: Princeton, New Jersey, April 6, 2026 - The use of Artificial Intelligence (AI) is rapidly increasing worldwide, leading to a growing need for strict supervision and ethical implementation. Palindrome Technologies, a renowned leader in information security, is actively addressing this demand.

data.title: The Sanborn Map Company Celebrates 160 Years of Innovation and Leadership in Geospatial Intelligence
data.description: In Colorado Springs, the Sanborn Map Company, Inc. celebrates its 160th anniversary, highlighting a rich history of innovation, technical expertise, and reliability.

data.title: Streamex Corp. Announces Webcast Details for Wednesday, April 8 Earnings and Corporate Update Presentation
data.description: Winter Park, Florida - Streamex Corp., a technology and infrastructure firm specializing in tokenizing real-world commodity assets, disclosed plans for its upcoming earnings and corporate update webcast. The presentation is scheduled for Wednesday, April 8, 2026, at 4:30 p.m. EDT. Streamex, listed as STEX on NASDAQ, aims to share key financial information and strategic developments during this webcast.

data.title: Medicus Pharma Submits Optimized Phase 2 Study Protocol to U.S. FDA for Teverelix in Acute Urinary Retention
data.description: Efficient study design focused on mechanisms aims to accelerate development and create value in the near term, targeting a potential market worth $2 billion. This strategy prioritizes capital efficiency to maximize outcomes while expediting the process for market entry.

data.title: RenX Enterprises Renews Major Organic Waste Transport Partnership Responsible For More Than $3 Million in Revenue in 2025
data.description: In Miami, FL on April 06, 2026, RenX Enterprises Corp. (NASDAQ: RENX) disclosed the renewal of a service agreement by its subsidiary, Zimmer Equipment Inc. ("ZEI"), with a major waste management firm in North America. This agreement covers the transportation of organic waste in the Tampa Bay metropolitan area, encompassing services to various transfer stations and material recovery facilities within the region. The significant contract renewal signifies a continued partnership between ZEI and one of the largest waste management companies in North America.

data.title: Capstone Awarded Eldorado Stone Distribution, Targeting $5 Million in Organic Revenue Growth
data.description: Capstone Holding Corp. (NASDAQ: CAPS) based in New York, a tech-enabled distributor of building products, recently secured distribution rights for Eldorado Stone, a top-tier manufacturer of stone veneer owned by Westlake Royal Building Products. They anticipate that this new addition will generate an additional $5 million in yearly revenue by the third quarter of 2027. Notably, this revenue is projected to come solely from utilizing Capstone's current distribution networks, requiring no extra expenditure on infrastructure.

data.title: Actinium Pharmaceuticals Announces New Pan-Tumor Preclinical Data for ATNM-400 in Solid Tumors and Differentiated Mechanism for Actimab-A in AML to be Presented at 2026 AACR Annual Meeting
data.description: Recent findings highlight the promising potential of ATNM-400 as a pioneering Ac-225 radioconjugate with widespread effectiveness against various solid tumors. Actimab-A showcases its mutation-agnostic efficacy and a unique mechanism that improves response to standard treatments for AML. The data emphasizes the broad pan-tumor efficacy of ATNM-400 and its ability to enhance outcomes in multiple solid tumor models.

data.title: DeFi Technologies Announces Shareholder Call to Discuss Record 2025 Financial Results with Revenue of $99.1 Million and Net Income of $62.7 Million
data.description: On April 6, 2026, in Toronto, DeFi Technologies Inc. shared news about its endeavors. The company, trading as Nasdaq: DEFT, CBOE CA: DEFI, and GR: R9B, focuses on connecting traditional capital markets with decentralized finance. They disclosed their plans to...

data.title: The Flavor Experts Bring a Burst of Fresh, Bold Flavor with Citrus Mojo
data.description: On April 7, a new and exciting flavor will be introduced by Wingstop (NASDAQ: WING), providing a delightful taste experience for wing enthusiasts across the country. This offering comes as a response to the changing seasons and aims to satisfy the cravings of customers.

data.title: REOS - VIRUNGA CRITICAL ANNOUNCES APPOINTMENT OF A NEW BOARD OF DIRECTORS
data.description: A company called Virunga Critical Inc., based in Delaware, has acquired a majority stake in REOSTAR Energy ("REOS") with a purchase of 54,750,000 shares. The deal was finalized recently and marks a significant move for Virunga Critical Inc. The new Board of Directors has been appointed following the acquisition.

data.title: UAE Joins Svalbard Treaty in Norway to Support Arctic Research and Cooperation
data.description: On April 6, 2026, Abu Dhabi, UAE announced its membership in the Svalbard Treaty through Federal Decree No. 125 of 2025. This move signifies the country's dedication to polar science and global collaboration. By joining this treaty, the UAE underscores its commitment to safeguarding critical global areas.
